The bioactive constituents of the Ginger plant include gingerols, shogaols, and zingerone, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ginger include teas, tinctures, capsules, and ginger supplements, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and colds.
